title: Find Proteins of Unknown Function (PUFs) using Plantannot - Protocol C
author: Marcos Viana
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgdijs4e

steps.title: Enter the Plantannot Result's page, with...
steps.instruction: Enter the Plantannot Result's page, with empty filters and text box search: https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot/find/?q= Or you can enter the https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot initial page and click on the magnifying glass with the text box empty as well. https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot

steps.title: Find PUFs from organisms that proteins...
steps.instruction: Find PUFs from organisms that proteins are already public in the NCBI´s "nr" database and have no protein domains found by Interproscan. Proteins will be selected using the text search "Unknown function". Visualize the "Filters" card on the left of the page from step1: https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot/find/?q=

steps.title: In the "Organisms" filter, select any...
steps.instruction: In the "Organisms" filter, select any organisms (expand the organism's list using the green arrow) or select all by leaving all boxes empty. We will use Oropetium tomaeum as example. Click "apply" to execute the filter: https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot/find/?q=&selected_facets=organism%3AOropetium+thomaeum

steps.title: In the "Feature type" filter, select...
steps.instruction: In the "Feature type" filter, select "polypeptide", and click "apply" to execute the filter: https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot/find/?q=&selected_facets=organism%3AOropetium+thomaeum&selected_facets=so_term%3Apolypeptide

steps.title: In the "Analyses" filter, select both...
steps.instruction: In the "Analyses" filter, select both "diamond matches" and "no interproscan matches", and click "apply" to execute the filter: https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot/find/?q=&selected_facets=organism%3AOropetium+thomaeum&selected_facets=so_term%3Apolypeptide&selected_facets=analyses%3Adiamond+matches&selected_facets=analyses%3Ano+interproscan+matches

steps.title: Leave the "Orthology" and "Coexpression" and "Orthologs_coexpression" filters empty:
steps.instruction: Leave the "Orthology" and "Coexpression" and "Orthologs_coexpression" filters empty:

steps.title: In addition to the applied filters,...
steps.instruction: In addition to the applied filters, text search for "Unknown function" in the search box. After entering the text click on the magnifying glass icon to apply the search. https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot/find/?q=Unknown+function&selected_facets=organism%3AOropetium+thomaeum&selected_facets=so_term%3Apolypeptide&selected_facets=analyses%3Adiamond+matches&selected_facets=analyses%3Ano+interproscan+matches

steps.title: After execution of all filters we...
steps.instruction: After execution of all filters we will have the following list of filters: https://www.machado.cnptia.embrapa.br/plantannot/find/?q=Unknown+function&selected_facets=organism%3AOropetium+thomaeum&selected_facets=so_term%3Apolypeptide&selected_facets=analyses%3Adiamond+matches&selected_facets=analyses%3Ano+interproscan+matches

steps.title: Visualize the "Results" card on the...
steps.instruction: Visualize the "Results" card on the center-right of the screen, we will have the resulting list of Oropetium's PUFs, 7 PUFs were filtered:
